hooks.command: if [ -f tsconfig.json ]; then npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -10 && npm run build 2>&1 | tail -10; fi
case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in *.py) python -m py_compile "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" && echo '✓ syntax ok' || echo '✗ syntax error' ;; *.ts) npx tsc --noEmit "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>&1 | head -5 ;; esac
case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in *.py) python -m py_compile "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" && echo '✓ syntax ok' || echo '✗ syntax error' ;; *.ts) npx tsc --noEmit "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>&1 | head -5 ;; esac
